  <h2 id="lecture_heading" class="section-title dsp-flex-xs flex-align-items-center-xs" data-lecture-id="23650999" data-next-lecture-id="9123891" data-lecture-url="/courses/465756/lectures/23650999" data-next-lecture-url="/courses/465756/lectures/9123891" ,="" data-previous-lecture-url="/courses/465756/lectures/65435582" data-previous-lecture-id="65435582">

    4. TMS LEXICON (A-Z) -- The Artist's Dictionary
</h2>

  <!-- Attachment Blocks -->
<!-- DEBUG: attachments.count=2 -->

  <!-- DEBUG: attachment.id=42587822, kind=text -->
  <div class="lecture-attachment lecture-attachment-type-text" id="lecture-attachment-42587822">
    <div class="attachment-data"></div>
    
      <div class="attachment-data"></div>
<div class="lecture-text-container">
<p></p><h1><strong>ARTIST INSURANCE</strong></h1><p>The steps you take to constantly remind yourself that life will bring challenges to make things hard for you. So you plan ahead with your contingency plan, your alterned to-do lists etc.. for when it does. (see also 'Life Happens' Protocol)</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>CHEAT DAYS</strong></h1><p>Days you EARN that are still productive, but where social media, junk food and brain-numbing entertainment is allowed. Always planned IN ADVANCE, and immediately followed by an outrageously discipline workday to numb the monkey mind into a stupor. (Cheat Days still END with perfect discipline. Bedtime is never ever compromised.)</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>CLAUSE (X)</strong></h1><p>The clause I put in every client contract to allow me to bring chance elements into a creative project to imbue it with magic.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>COMPLICATION CREEP</strong></h1><p>It's when you take your simple attainable goal and you keep adding new elements to it because you're feel "strong", and manic, and like you can take over the world...!! But the moment something throws you off your game-- You get overwhelmed. What was once a garden... Is now full of weeds. Damn. You started with one simple goal. But then you either got bored. Or worse... Cocky-- And now you have too many paths, too many side-projects, and way too many things on your TODO list. Please, get back to the essence.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>CONGREGATION</strong></h1><p>The Mystery School extended family.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>DAYDREAMING LANGUAGE</strong></h1><p>The flowery language you use to avoid being specific about your goals and message. Daydreaming language tricks you into thinking you're on the right path... But because your goals aren't clearly stated, it doesn't have legs to stand on. "Daydreaming Language" is why you get glazed-over looks from your aunt at Thanksgiving dinner when you tell her what you've been up to. "Daydreaming Language " is also the leading cause of your "pendulum of doubt". The opposite? Realistic language. Realistic language is when you put a plan down on paper. A plan you cross-check with people who have been on the path before. Realistic language will keep you motivated even when you're tired. It's definite and clear language that excites the people rooting for you... <em>And gives gatekeepers FOMO</em>. Realistic language is the only way you'll ever enlist people who will help you realize your vision. </p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>'DO OR DIE' / ARTIST DEMEANOR</strong></h1><p>It’s when your obsession reaches the level where even death isn’t a deterrent. Your aura takes on an air of calmness now, as you ride each day into your destiny with clarity.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>DOUBLE-DOWN ON YOURSELF</strong></h1><p>It's when you decide to start doing the things that are intrinsically YOU even if they are unpopular at the moment. It's when you finally KNOW people will catch your wave over time.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>DRIVE-BY MENTALITY</strong></h1><p>The state of mind where someone is open to meeting and engaging with strangers no matter who they are just to get out of their comfort zone.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>DROP BOMBS</strong></h1><p>(a) Sharing high-quality art or media that contains your message... (b) Sharing high-quality art or media that's so fearless in it's expression that it's impossible to scroll by— even in a sea of content..</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>EXCHANGE VALUE</strong></h1><p>What you are offering to the world in return for what you want from the world. </p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>EXTENDED CIRCADIAN RHYTHM</strong></h1><p>Biology patterns you monitor that go beyond sleep.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>FALSE LANGUAGE</strong></h1><p>When you use misleading words, cliches, or "feel good" memes to rationalize your failings or to delay real action.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>FRAGMENTED BRAIN</strong></h1><p>A brain that has been fried by social media. Your brain is in a constant loop going between a state of zero attention span to experiencing deep moments of self-loathing whenever you’re forced to be with yourself.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>GOD MOMENTUM</strong></h1><p>God Momentum is self-generated momentum where you no longer need discipline and motivation to get you going. Your desire to procrastinate and delay "the work" is replaced by a sustainable obsession to create. Action and discipline become so enjoyable that it becomes your new way of life. This flow state can last for days, weeks, and sometimes even months.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>(THE) LANGUAGE TRAP</strong></h1><p>When you change the meaning of words or concepts so that you can continue to do things the old way. You get hung up on the words and loose the essence.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>(THE) LIAR</strong></h1><p>The voice in your head that gives you every excuse you can find to never get out of your comfort zone.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>"LIFE HAPPENS" PROTOCOL</strong></h1><p>An 'art insurance' letter you write to your future self (sealed, and placed in a secret place) describing in full detail what steps to take when a real-life emergency threatens your art making schedule.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>MESSAGE</strong></h1><p>The artist's worldview. Your artistic vision. A brand new way of seeing / doing things expressed in words to your audience. The best messages also tell people how you plan to achieve that vision. This is the whole reason why your audience f-cks with you.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>MILLION DOLLAR PERSPECTIVE</strong></h1><p>When you can be happy even when things aren't going your way because you know you're blessed to be alive.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>MOMENTS OF ZERO</strong></h1><p>The simple boring activities (reading, meditating, going for a walk) that increase your energy.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>NBC</strong></h1><p>Natural Born Creative</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>OLYMPICS OF THE UNKNOWN</strong></h1><p>The idea that no act of courage is worthier than someone else's. In reality, anyone's step outside their comfort zone is growth.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>(the) ORDER OF THINGS</strong></h1><p>The order to follow to choose how to get things done: Prioritize things that have a disproportionate effect on your goals.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>POLARIS STAR</strong></h1><p>Your vision of the artist that you will become in the future.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>PRETENDERS VS RENEGADES</strong></h1><p>Pretenders are the talkers. Renegades are the doers.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>SIMULATION</strong></h1><p>The period of time where you practice a new intense art-making schedule to make sure it's realistic and sustainable.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>SLOW BURN ART</strong></h1><p>The art you labor on while you go on being a "creation machine" with everything else.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>(#)TRUTHLOTION</strong></h1><p>A social media post, writing, or podcast, that is truthful, but might be painful to hear.</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>VAULT MENTALITY</strong></h1><p>When you become such a creative machine that it's necessary to start logging your output on a spreadsheet, start labeling multiple hard drives, and start keeping a filing system for everything you create. 'VAULT MENTALITY' is what Prince had. He left behind a vault of hundreds of albums to release into the next century! <br class="softbreak"><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>(the) VOICES</strong></h1><p>The voices you hear in your head when you start God Momentum. They ask you to quit. They tell you to cut corners. They encourage you to take increasingly longer breaks. If you fight them, they will eventually quieten. (But unfortunately, they never disappear.)<br class="softbreak"><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>WALLPAPER</strong></h1><p>Art with no message. Art whose only use is decoration. Non-confrontational, “people pleasing” art. </p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1><strong>WEAPON LIST </strong></h1><p>The 'weapon list' is a list you make of everything you can name that's holding you back from success. And right next to each obstacle, you write down a realistic antidote against it. A tool, a recourse, or an ally that you have at your disposal. These are your weapons. Your goal in the upcoming months is to sharpen those weapons.</p><p></p>
</div>
